title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Logistics Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!
